message:
fix(layout,wasm): guard against NaN positions in force layout and align canvas typography with SVG config

force_normalize_positions could panic or produce garbage when node positions
contained NaN/Inf from degenerate force-directed layouts. Now skips non-finite
positions when computing bounding box and early-returns if no valid positions
exist.

Also fixes bk_horizontal_compaction to bounds-check both nodes[i] and
nodes[i-1] before writing pred_in_rank, preventing out-of-bounds access when
ordering contains sentinel values.

On the WASM side, introduces align_canvas_typography_with_svg() to keep canvas
font_family and font_size in sync with the SVG config, preventing visual
discrepancies between SVG-based layout measurements and canvas rendering. This
alignment is now applied in RuntimeConfig::default(), init(), Diagram::new(),
render_to_canvas(), and render_to_canvas_js().

- crates/fm-layout/src/lib.rs: add NaN/Inf guards in force_normalize_positions,
  fix bounds check in bk_horizontal_compaction
- crates/fm-wasm/src/lib.rs: add align_canvas_typography_with_svg(), apply it
  in all config merge paths, add two tests for typography alignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
